# 🚀 PipTray - Signal Marketplace

> **Precision Trading. Proven Results.** 🎯

A professional signal subscription marketplace connecting verified signal providers with traders across East Africa and beyond.

![PipTray](https://img.shields.io/badge/Built%20for-East%20Africa-green)
![Next.js](https://img.shields.io/badge/Next.js-15-black)
![TypeScript](https://img.shields.io/badge/TypeScript-5-blue)
![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-MIT-yellow)

---

## ✨ Features

### For Traders (Subscribers)
- 🔍 **Browse Verified Providers** - Search and filter by win rate, pair, rating
- 📊 **Real Performance Stats** - Auto-calculated win rates (no fake screenshots!)
- 💳 **Multiple Payment Options** - Crypto (USDT) & Mobile Money (MTN/Airtel)
- 📱 **Install as App** - Works as a native mobile app (PWA)
- 🔔 **Real-time Notifications** - Never miss a signal
- ✉️ **Email Verification** - Secure account verification

### For Signal Providers
- 📈 **Professional Dashboard** - Post and manage signals easily
- 👥 **Subscriber Management** - Auto-add/remove based on payment status
- 💰 **Keep 93% of Earnings** - Lower fees than Telegram scams
- 🏆 **Verification Badges** - Build trust with verified status
- 📉 **Performance Tracking** - Win rate, pips, ROI auto-calculated

### For Platform Admin
- ✅ **Approve Providers** - Review and approve applications
- 💵 **View All Payments** - Track platform revenue
- 👤 **User Management** - Manage all users and providers
- ⚙️ **Platform Settings** - Configure fees and requirements

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

- **Frontend:** Next.js 15, React 19, TypeScript
- **Styling:** Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
- **PWA:** Service Worker, Web App Manifest
- **Storage:** localStorage (demo) / Supabase (production)
- **Payments:** Crypto + Mobile Money ready
- **Email:** Resend (free tier: 3,000 emails/month)

---

## 🚀 Quick Start

### Prerequisites
- Node.js 18+
- Bun or npm

### Installation

```bash
# Clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/hamtechug256/piptray.git

# Navigate to project
cd piptray

# Install dependencies
bun install

# Run development server
bun run dev
```

Open [http://localhost:3000](http://localhost:3000) in your browser.

---

## 📧 Email Verification Setup (FREE!)

PipTray uses **Resend** for email verification - completely FREE with 3,000 emails/month!

### 🚀 Quick Setup (5 minutes)

1. **Create FREE Resend Account:**
   - Go to [resend.com](https://resend.com)
   - Sign up with your email
   - Go to [API Keys](https://resend.com/api-keys)
   - Click "Create API Key"
   - Copy your key (starts with `re_`)

2. **Update `.env` file:**
   ```bash
   # Open .env and add your API key
   RESEND_API_KEY=re_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
   
   # For testing, keep the default sender:
   RESEND_FROM_EMAIL=onboarding@resend.dev
   ```

3. **Test it!**
   - Restart your dev server: `bun run dev`
   - Register a new account
   - Check the verification email in your inbox!

### 📧 Email Sender Options

| Option | Who can receive | Setup |
|--------|----------------|-------|
| `onboarding@resend.dev` | Only YOUR signup email | Works instantly |
| Custom domain | Anyone | Verify domain at resend.com/domains |

### 🧪 Demo Mode (No API Key)

If `RESEND_API_KEY` is not set or set to placeholder:
- Verification codes are shown on screen
- Works for testing and development
- No emails are actually sent

### 🔧 Environment Variables

```bash
# Required for email sending
RESEND_API_KEY=re_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx

# Optional - defaults to onboarding@resend.dev
RESEND_FROM_EMAIL=noreply@yourdomain.com

# App URL for email links
NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=http://localhost:3000
```

---

## 📱 Install as Mobile App

1. Open the website in Chrome or Safari
2. Tap the menu/share button
3. Select "Add to Home Screen"
4. The app works like a native mobile app!

---

## 🔐 Demo Credentials

```
Admin Login:
Email: admin@piptray.com
Password: admin123

Or create your own account with any email
(Note: In demo mode, verification codes appear in browser console)
```

---

## 💳 Payment Integration

### Supported Payment Methods
| Method | Fee | Status |
|--------|-----|--------|
| USDT/USDC (Crypto) | 5% | ✅ Ready |
| MTN Mobile Money | 7% | ✅ Ready |
| Airtel Money | 7% | ✅ Ready |

---

## 📁 Project Structure

```
src/
├── app/
│   ├── page.tsx              # Landing page
│   ├── layout.tsx            # Root layout with SEO
│   ├── globals.css           # Professional light theme
│   ├── login/                # Login page
│   ├── register/             # Registration with role selection
│   ├── verify/               # Email verification page
│   ├── dashboard/            # User/Provider dashboard
│   ├── providers/            # Browse all providers
│   ├── provider/[id]/        # Provider profile & subscription
│   ├── signals/              # View subscribed signals
│   ├── apply/                # Provider application form
│   ├── admin/                # Admin management panel
│   └── api/auth/             # Authentication API routes
│       ├── send-verification/ # Send verification email
│       └── verify-code/      # Verify verification code
├── lib/
│   ├── signal-types.ts       # TypeScript types
│   └── signal-storage.ts     # localStorage helpers
├── hooks/
│   └── use-pwa.ts            # PWA installation hook
└── components/ui/            # Reusable UI components
```

---

## 🎯 Why PipTray is Better Than Telegram

| Feature | Telegram | PipTray |
|---------|----------|--------|
| Performance Tracking | ❌ None | ✅ Auto-calculated |
| Fake Results | ❌ Easy | ✅ Impossible |
| Payment Verification | ❌ Manual | ✅ Instant |
| Subscriber Management | ❌ Manual | ✅ Automated |
| Trust System | ❌ None | ✅ Badges & Reviews |
| Signal Organization | ❌ Chat mess | ✅ Clean dashboard |
| Email Verification | ❌ None | ✅ Secure login |
| Provider Revenue | Varies | 93% guaranteed |

---

## 💰 Revenue Model

```
Platform Fee: 5-7% per transaction

Example Calculation:
- 100 providers
- 20 avg subscribers each
- UGX 100,000 avg subscription

Monthly Transactions: 100 × 20 × 100,000 = UGX 20,000,000
Platform Revenue (7%): UGX 1,400,000/month ($350)

Scale to 500 providers = UGX 7,000,000/month ($1,750)
```

---

## 🔒 Security Features

- ✅ **Email Verification** - All users must verify email before accessing dashboard
- ✅ **Secure Code Expiry** - Verification codes expire in 15 minutes
- ✅ **One-Time Codes** - Codes are invalidated after use
- ✅ **Rate Limiting Ready** - Built-in cooldown for resending codes
- ✅ **Admin Bypass** - Admin accounts are auto-verified for convenience

---

## 🚀 Deployment

### Vercel (Recommended)

```bash
# Install Vercel CLI
npm i -g vercel

# Deploy
vercel
```

### Environment Variables for Production

```bash
# .env.production
RESEND_API_KEY=re_xxxxxxxxxxxxxxxxx
NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=https://your-domain.com
```
